CAN: NOT ABOUT MONEY

Emre Can insists his contract stand-off with Liverpool is “not about money”.

The midfielder will be a free agent at the end of the season and has been linked with a move to Juventus.

Asked by the Liverpool Echo whether he would still be a Liverpool player next season, Can said: "Why do you ask me this? Really, I concentrate on this season and let my agent handle all the rest.

"It is not about money, that’s all I can say. Yes I could (sign a pre-contract with another club next month), but tomorrow I could also sign for Liverpool. We’ll see."

BREAKING NEWS

Manchester United are interested in signing Schalke midfielder Leon Goretzka.

Goretzka is out of contract in the summer and would be free to negotiate a pre-contract agreement with foreign clubs from January 1.

Schalke want him to stay and have offered him a new deal which would make him the highest paid player in the club's history.

WERNER NOT FOR SALE

RB Leipzig sporting director Ralph Rangnick has dismissed speculation of Timo Werner joining Real Madrid either in January or next summer.

The striker has been linked with a move to the Bernabeu after scoring 28 goals in 42 league appearances for RB Leipzig.

But Rangnick says: "In winter nor in summer: We will keep Timo Werner with us. We are in intensive talks with his advisor."

An unnamed English club are one of "three or four clubs" interested in signing Barcelona outcast Arda Turan, according to the player’s agent.

Turan, who has not featured for Barca this season, looks set to leave the Camp Nou in the January transfer window.

"There are three or four clubs that want Arda, but after 15 days the situation will be clear," his agent Ahmet Bulut is quoted as saying in Sport.

"[I am going to meet with] Galatasaray. We find ourselves with three to four teams that want him. There are teams from England, Spain and Italy. We will decide in 15 days. We have two very clear options for Arda. One of those wants a loan, the other wants a transfer."

REAL INTEREST IN SALAH?

Egypt manager Hector Cuper claims Real Madrid are interested in signing Liverpool's Mohamed Salah.

"I’ve received confirmed news revealing Real Madrid’s interest in Salah, but let’s not rush things," he told ON Sport TV.

"To me, he is in an amazing position right now."

NO CAN OFFERS IN JANUARY

According to Italian daily Tuttosport, Juventus are still interested in signing to Emre Can, but they won't make any offers in January.

The Serie A champions will instead wait until June to snap up the Liverpool midfielder, heavily linked with Manchester City, on a free transfer.

Asked by the Liverpool Echo whether he would still be a Liverpool player next season, Can said: "Why do you ask me this? Really, I concentrate on this season and let my agent handle all the rest.”

WALCOTT EYED AS LUKAKU REPLACEMENT

Everton have marked Theo Walcott as a potential replacement for Romelu
Lukaku and have opened talks with Arsenal over a possible transfer, according to the Daily Mail.

Lukaku left Goodison Park for Manchester United in a £75 million move over the summer and has not yet been replaced by the Toffees.

Walcott is said to be available for purchase in January having not made a single start under Arsene Wenger this season and is a target for new Everton boss Sam Allardyce.

RED ROSE?

Tottenham left-back Danny Rose could be swapping London for Manchester, the Daily Mail reports.

Manchester United are understood to be targeting the 27-year-old for a move in January or next summer.

United boss Jose Mourinho said to be confident a deal worth £50m is feasible.

COUTINHO UNSURE ON FUTURE

Philippe Coutinho admits he is unsure where his club future lies but has vowed to continue giving his all for Liverpool while he remains at Anfield.

"I am at Liverpool and I always do my best when I have the opportunity to play, respecting the jersey and the supporters," said Coutinho, who has scored nine goals in 13 appearances this season.

"I do not know how the future is going to be. What will happen in January, we will know it in January. I do not know if there will be an offer.
"Last summer there was a job offer in the same way that happens with any employee and I was interested in it. Since I stayed I have played with will and desire."

I HAVE NO CRYSTAL BALL – LIVERPOOL CEO UNSURE OF COUTINHO FUTURE

Liverpool chief executive Peter Moore is unsure if Philippe Coutinho will still be at the club after the January transfer window, saying he has "no crystal ball".

Speaking to Sky Sports, Moore said: "[On Wednesday] I saw a player delighted to score a hat-trick in front of 54,000 fans. It's all about Philippe on the pitch right now.

"As far as I'm concerned the squad in January is what we have. I have no
crystal ball."

But Moore highlighted that Liverpool's recruitment team are doing a good job, pointing to the purchases of Mohamed Salah, Naby Keita and Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain.

"From the perspective of competing, we do things the Liverpool way," Moore said.

"The chemistry that we build on the field – it's not about buying the most expensive player.

"We haven't been shy [in terms of spending]. Obviously, the Mohamed Salah purchase for many people has been the top acquisition of the season.

"We already have Naby Keita coming and I think Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain is doing a tremendous job.

"The investments are being made. It's hard to knock what you are seeing on the field right now."

PSG have contacted Alex Sandro

PSG Sporting Director Antero Henrique has made contact with the entourage of Brazilian left-back Alex Sandro, according to our well-informed colleagues at Paris United.

Les Parisiens intend to make moves in this position in summer, not next month, as Layvin Kurzawa continues to underwhelm as first choice at left-back.

The 26-year-old is understandably incredibly interested at the prospect of joining the ever-growing Brazilian contingent in the French capital, despite Juventus’ attempts to get him to sign a new contract.

Faouzi Ghoulam is another individual who has been on PSG’s radar for some time, and the Napoli left-back now has a €35m release clause in his most recent contract. The Algerian international however favours an eventual move to the Premier League.

AC米蘭CEO：球隊增兵過多

AC米蘭CEO法索尼表示，球隊在今季增兵過多，反而不利在聯賽發揮。

AC米蘭今季大換血，花了1億9400萬歐羅買入11位新球員，包括祖雲達斯守將邦路斯。

然而，買得人多不代表成績馬上轉好，AC米蘭CEO法索尼承認，這樣反而害了球隊：「我們是否買了太多人？可能是這樣吧。我們有很多資金，當時蒙迪拿說現有班底可以大換人，只留6至7人。」

「只是，一開始幾個月很難真正組織一支球隊，所以上半季我們成績可能不會太好。現在我們失了5至6分，要殺上前4不是這麼容易了。」法索尼說道。

皮利斯：基奧特有所不滿

阿仙奴名宿皮利斯表示，法國前鋒基奧特對於自己在阿仙奴的處境不滿，仍然未肯定自己的未來去向。

31歲的基奧特今季未曾在阿仙奴出任一場正選，雖然他經常後備入波，但出場次序排在法國隊隊友拿卡錫迪之後。

因為世界盃臨近，基奧特對於自己的現狀感到不滿，考慮外借離隊。不過，皮利斯指基奧特好應該先和高層商量一番。

「我見到基奧特上場對修咸頓的美妙入球，他一落場便有作用了。當然，他想多點比賽，入選法國隊踢世界盃。足球就是這樣，雲格有個難題，到底揀基奧特還是拿卡錫迪正選。如果我是基奧特，首先會去找雲格傾談，他是一個重要球員，有任何決定之前應該先找高層商量。」皮利斯說。

「會面之後才決定吧，我知道現時狀況對於他來說不是一個理想狀態。至於阿仙奴，首先要以打入前4為目標，第二是要像曼聯去季般贏歐霸盃，這是一個真正的機會。即使大家說它不如歐聯，但球隊目標應該是去贏取一些東西，去贏歐霸盃對阿仙奴很重要。」皮利斯說。

BATSHUAYI SEEKS LOAN MOVE

Michy Batshuayi is keen on a loan move away from Stamford Bridge in order to boost his chances of featuring for Belgium at this summer's World Cup, according to Football London.

Batshuayi has scored seven goals in 15 appearances for the Blues this season, including a last-minute winner against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League in October, but has found starts difficult to come by with coach Antonio Conte preferring to look to top-scorer Alvaro Morata to lead his line.

Conte is reportedly keen on Monaco forward Thomas Lemar and could consider using the Belgian as a makeweight in any potential deal.

LUIZ 'COULD LEAVE IN JAN'

David Luiz could leave Chelsea in the January transfer window as the fall-out from his bust-up with Antonio Conte continues, Sunday People Chief Football Writer Steve Bates told Sunday Supplement.

Luiz and Conte were involved in an altercation following Chelsea's 3-0 defeat away at Roma in the Champions League in October, and the Brazilian hasn't featured in the league since with Andreas Christensen lining up in the centre of the team's defensive three while Luiz reportedly recovers from a knee injury.

"At his press conference on Friday he was at pains to point out that this knee injury is genuine," said Bates. "I had no reason to believe it's not.

"I think his problems at Stamford Bridge go deeper than just a knee injury. From the start of the season there's not been an easy relationship with Conte. He's a very demanding, highly-strung boss. Obviously, in the summer we saw David Luiz's big pal Diego Costa shipped out of the club as well."

Renato Sanches could return to Bayern Munich prematurely after the German clubs sports director, Hasan Salihamidzic, revealed his development at the Premier League club hasn’t been optimal. (SportBild)

BARCA ‘CONFIRM’ GRIEZMANN MEETING

Barcelona appear to have confirmed a report which claimed club president Josep Maria Bartomeu met with Antoine Griezmann’s family.

Barca have been linked with the Atletico Madrid forward and speculation was fuelled on Sunday when Mundo Deportivo reported Bartomeu met the 26-year-old’s parents and sister in Barcelona.

When asked about that story, Barca’s Director of Institutional and Sporting Relations, Guillermo Amor, told Movistar Partidazo: “If this newspaper says it, it will be like that.

"It may be that there has been an approach and that something has been advanced. It’s work of the club that is usually done. It’s inevitable that in the world of football you can talk with players. It’s something that’s usually done.”

PEP SET FOR CITY CONTRACT TALKS

Manchester City bosses will hold talks with Pep Guardiola at the end of the season with a view to extending his stay at the club beyond his current three-year deal.

Chairman Khaldoun Al Mubarak and CEO Ferran Sorriano traditionally hold an end-of-season review into all workings at City and top of next May's agenda is convincing Guardiola to sign a new deal.

The 46-year-old is halfway through his current three-year contract and sources connected to the Premier League leaders are confident everything is in place to persuade him to remain and establish a dynasty to rival that of Sir Alex Ferguson's at Manchester United.

PEP SET FOR CITY CONTRACT TALKS

Manchester City bosses will hold talks with Pep Guardiola at the end of the season with a view to extending his stay at the club beyond his current three-year deal.

Chairman Khaldoun Al Mubarak and CEO Ferran Sorriano traditionally hold an end-of-season review into all workings at City and top of next May's agenda is convincing Guardiola to sign a new deal.

The 46-year-old is halfway through his current three-year contract and sources connected to the Premier League leaders are confident everything is in place to persuade him to remain and establish a dynasty to rival that of Sir Alex Ferguson's at Manchester United.

Manchester City set to sign two centre-back, 1 in January, 1 in summer.

Pep Guardiola is concerning over the fitness reliability of captain Vincent Kompany and the quality level of Eliaquim Mangala. He is looking to bring another centre-back in to Manchester City in January and another centre-back in summer.

Although Virgil van Dijk and Andreas Christensen among the top targets of City, Pep doesn't confident these deal would happen in January.

Manchester City are trying to sign one centre-back in mid-season first. They are ready to make a move for Inigo Martinez and retained interest in Jonny Evans to bolster their defence in January.

BREAKING: Atletico Madrid to report Barcelona to Fifa over Griezmann pursuit

BREAKING: Atletico Madrid to report Barcelona to Fifa over Griezmann pursuit

Atletico Madrid are preparing to present an official complaint to Fifa over Barcelona's pursuit of French forward Antoine Griezmann.

The Rojiblancos are understood be angered by Barca's increasingly public pursuit of their star striker, with a director of the Catalan club recently admitting there had been contact with the player who is still under contract to the Madrid side.

"If Bartomeu met with Griezmann's family as the newspapers say, then there may well have been an approach," Guillermo Amor admitted. "Though, I don't know anything for sure.

"There is a good relationship, there can also be comfortable conversations. Rumours are inevitable in the football world.

"In Griezmann's case there are many people we talk to; it's our obligation to have contact with players."

More follows…

國內免税應該係除非球員buyout自己合約
咁你解左合約就free agent簽國內國外都得

而國外就唔洗

Sometimes reports claim that a player can have two release clauses. For example, the value might be higher if the buying club is a direct rival or from another league.

Sanchez-Bote: Once the player deposits the agreed sum to free himself, he can then sign for any other club, whether Spanish or foreign. There is no justification in the law for a contract having different clauses depending on which club wishes to sign the player.

比低過都唔係唔得 咪睇下馬體接唔接受囉
不過一出到release clause就係下體冇得話事咁姐


補一補堂

拎kepa做例子
佢解約金係€20m
但係皇馬會直接俾€25m
點解要咁做?因為皇馬俾€25m仲少過本身俾(€20m+tax)個數
上年施巴路斯由貝迪斯過皇馬一樣
都係俾多過解約金


學到野，tax係點計?

以前好似係45%
上年稅制轉左唔知係咪仲係
重點係唔經release clause買就可以自己set浮動條款

http://www.espn.co.uk/football/spanish-primera-division/15/blog/post/3172294/how-release-clauses-work-neymar-treated-like-any-spanish-worker
依家好似免税 事件起因似係疤想乞 好似利追vdj咁比人玩

國內免税應該係除非球員buyout自己合約
咁你解左合約就free agent簽國內國外都得

但係用球會名義俾錢就應該西班牙國內仲要俾稅
而國外就唔洗

Sometimes reports claim that a player can have two release clauses. For example, the value might be higher if the buying club is a direct rival or from another league.

Sanchez-Bote: Once the player deposits the agreed sum to free himself, he can then sign for any other club, whether Spanish or foreign. There is no justification in the law for a contract having different clauses depending on which club wishes to sign the player.

Arsenal and Everton to hold transfer talks with Steven N'Zonzi as Sevilla midfielder arrives at Gatwick Airport to visit his son in London

Arsenal and Everton will hold talks with Steven N'Zonzi after the Sevilla midfielder flew into London on Tuesday evening.

The former Stoke star was pictured walking through Gatwick Airport wearing a backpack, while a man pulled a large suitcase alongside him.

It is believed N'Zonzi is in the capital to visit his son, although the Premier League duo will take the opportunity to discuss a move with the out-of-favour Frenchman.

INTER WANT TO KEEP JOAO MARIO

Inter director Walter Sabatini says he wants Portugal international Joao Mario to remain at the club despite reported interest from Manchester United.

Mario has been dropped from the starting XI by manager Luciano Spalletti, but Sabatini wants to keep hold of him.

“As with all those who have to earn their place at the World Cup, Joao has some issues with the lack of playing time," he told Sky Sports Italy.

"We don’t want to lose him, so he and Luciano Spalletti will find common ground and they’ll work out what to do.

"He is our player and we want to keep him."

巴神：願為冠軍免費回巢曼城

【now.com體育】錦標與高薪，如何作出選擇？性情中人巴洛迪利就表示，冠軍最重要。巴神最近受訪時稱，若然有機會重投曼城，不收分文也願意助球隊爭冠。

曾經是國際球壇風雲人物之一的意大利前鋒巴洛迪利（Mario Balotelli），現時效力法甲球隊尼斯，曝光率比起過往稍為減低。日前接受《La Gazzetta dello Sport》訪問時，自言「經一事，長一智」的巴神表示：「回到一間大球會贏重要錦標是我的目標；我希望回去，有強大的後盾支援我。我想踢歐聯、贏冠軍。」

2010年當選歐洲金童的巴神，總共協助國際米蘭贏得6項錦標，包括歐洲最高榮譽的歐聯。2010年轉投曼城的他，是球隊2011/12球季英超封王的成員之一；可惜，這個英超冠軍已經是巴神最後一個具份量的球會級比賽錦標。

先後效力AC米蘭與利物浦都未有好結果的巴神稱：「我踢得最好的球季是效力曼城的時候。球會的氣氛獨一無二；若然能夠回去踢波，我即使沒有薪金也可以。」先後為一對米蘭宿敵效力過的巴神表示，現時與國際米蘭管理層關係仍然友好，但AC米蘭高層對他就不太歡迎。

巴神去年夏天免費加盟尼斯，只簽下為期1年的合約，但今夏獲得留用，與球會續約1年。今季法甲巴神上陣13場，攻入10球，但亦取得1張紅牌及4張黃牌，場上紀律看來仍有待改善。

PEP CHASING INTER DEFENDER

Manchester City are interested in signing Inter Milan defender Milan Skriniar in January, claims Calciomercato.com .

Skriniar only joined Inter in the summer in a €20 million deal from Sampdoria and he has enjoyed a stellar first half of the season.

The centre-half recently dismissed reports of interest from Barcelona, but now City boss Pep Guardiola is weighing up a deal for Skriniar to boost his defensive options.

雲高爾勸白蘭特投巴塞

【now.com體育】前領隊雲高爾再次向曼聯指指點點，今次就勸說後衛戴利白蘭特離隊，應該加盟巴塞隆拿。

雲高爾（Louis van Gaal）於2014年入主曼聯後，立即把在荷蘭國家隊合作愉快的戴利白蘭特（Daley Blind）帶到奧脫福，而且加以重用，於翌季更將對方改造成中堅，跟基斯史摩寧合拍。

不過，當摩連奴成為紅魔領隊後，白蘭特就退居副選，雲高爾呼籲愛將離開：「白蘭特應該加盟巴塞隆拿，不要留在曼聯，他現在有時連後備席也未能登上。他能夠出任多個位置，相信在巴塞永遠不會只坐在觀眾席。」

巴塞中堅馬斯真蘭奴很大機會在1月離隊，而且烏姆迪迪正在養傷，因此他們正找尋新中堅。雲高爾表示：「比起曼聯，我認為巴塞更適合白蘭特，他的水平和踢法，適合在西班牙踢球多於英格蘭。」

AUBAMEYANG'S ATLETICO HINT

Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang has suggested that he could replace Antoine Griezmann at Atletico Madrid.

Speaking to Ouest-France, he said: “[Atletico Madrid?] Everyone knows that they are looking for players around the world, I think that [Antoine] Griezmann could leave and many things could happen, everything could happen.”

Aubameyang also insists he has not signed a new contract at Dortmund.

“I have not signed [a contract renewal at Dortmund], that’s not true. The market is open, also for me,” he said.

多蒙特拒絕回收MK

【now.com體育】曼聯中場米希達利恩被打入冷宮，有傳他勢將在1月離隊，但前東家多蒙特無意「回收」。

阿美尼亞國腳米希達利恩（Henrikh Mkitaryan）今年28歲，本是當打之年，自從11月5日之後未嘗為曼聯正選搏殺，有指他與領隊摩連奴發生磨擦，盛傳將在下月轉會。18個月前，米希達利恩以2700萬鎊離開多蒙特改投紅魔，如今前東家會否仿傚「回收」香川真司和馬里奧葛斯般把他帶回德甲呢？

蜜蜂軍團行政總裁華斯克明確表示：「我是最清楚米希達利恩轉會曼聯的交易細節，比任何人都清楚，所以清楚知道回購他只是美好的幻想。」

然而，華斯克坦言可能在冬季轉會窗放走舒賀爾尼，並謂：「我們會同他的經理人洽談，惟目前未有甚麼事會發生。」

雲高爾勸白蘭特投巴塞

【http://now.com體育】前領隊雲高爾再次向曼聯指指點點，今次就勸說後衛戴利白蘭特離隊，應該加盟巴塞隆拿。

雲高爾（Louis van Gaal）於2014年入主曼聯後，立即把在荷蘭國家隊合作愉快的戴利白蘭特（Daley Blind）帶到奧脫福，而且加以重用，於翌季更將對方改造成中堅，跟基斯史摩寧合拍。

不過，當摩連奴成為紅魔領隊後，白蘭特就退居副選，雲高爾呼籲愛將離開：「白蘭特應該加盟巴塞隆拿，不要留在曼聯，他現在有時連後備席也未能登上。他能夠出任多個位置，相信在巴塞永遠不會只坐在觀眾席。」

巴塞中堅馬斯真蘭奴很大機會在1月離隊，而且烏姆迪迪正在養傷，因此他們正找尋新中堅。雲高爾表示：「比起曼聯，我認為巴塞更適合白蘭特，他的水平和踢法，適合在西班牙踢球多於英格蘭。」

咁你又買

JOSE: WE MUST SPEND MORE

Jose Mourinho has claimed Manchester United will need to spend more money after dropping another two points in their faltering title challenge at home to Burnley today.

"We are in the second year of trying to rebuild a football team that is not one of the best teams in the world. Manchester City buy full-backs for the price of strikers. When you speak about big football clubs, you are speaking about the history of the club."
When it was pointed out United have spent roughly £286million since Mourinho took charge in 2016, he added: "OK, (but) it is not enough. The price for the big clubs is different than for the other clubs."

Meeting today over a new Sevilla boss taking place and it has already lasted over two hours. Gracia and Montella apparently the final two.

Barcelona signing Coutinho in January is even more delusional than the club stupid bids of 80m plus add-ons made last summer while lying to the media they were bidding 150m. Wage bill has to be cleaned up and the win in the Clásico has diminished pressure for a big signing.

Yerry Mina has a big chance of being signed this January, while a surprise acquisition such as Arthur is improbable but possible if Grêmio is willing to negotiate rather than refer to his €50m that Barcelona won't pay.

quote.msg: Meeting today over a new Sevilla boss taking place and it has already lasted over two hours. Gracia and Montella apparently the final two.

replies.msg:
All indications are that Montella will get the job. Choice of the board. His number two is set be Maresca, cult figure at Sevilla.

Players are reportedly wanting Gracia in. Personally think he's ideal man for the job, tbh. Fine tactician and an excellent motivator.

For those interested Sevilla interviewed Mazzarri, Tuchel, Montella and Gracia. Few people asking about Luis Enrique; didn't want to start a job mid-season.
